samples.text: A light can be off now and on later. Is this logically consistent?
A light is off at present and on at a later time. Does this make logical sense?
A lamp can be off currently and switched on afterward. Is this logically consistent?
Off and on at different times are not contradictory. So this is consistent. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A light can be off now and on later. Someone left the door open earlier. Is this logically consistent?
